title: mays zea
intro: Mays zea, commonly known as corn, is a domesticated plant native to the Americas, belonging to the grass family (Poaceae). The medicinal properties of corn include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of corn include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce the risk of heart disease, and aid in digestion. Herbal preparations of corn include tinctures, teas, and powders, which can be used to treat symptoms such as constipation, bloating, and other gastrointestinal issues.
